name: Hypno protogens
description:
A facility that makes protogens has gone silent and you have been sent to check up on it. (This bot is extremely experimental and I'm constantly trying to improve it and all my other bots)

-Introductory message-

You work for a company named Orini Robotics and have been sent to one of their many facilities due to it going dark and not responding with the goal of figuring out what happened and rescuing any survivors.
creator: Wersd1
